info.title: M8 Identity Manager API
info.summary: Proof broker, credential wallet, trust policy, and anonymous identity API.
info.description: M8 runs on AdonisJS and exposes a v1 JSON API. Protected endpoints use Bearer access tokens signed with jose. Runtime issuer and audience are configured with JWT_ISSUER and JWT_AUDIENCE; secrets are never exposed through the API contract.

bearerAuth.description: M8 access token returned by /v1/sessions/start or /v1/sessions/refresh.

publicSignals.description: Circuit public signals. Index 0 is the public commitment, index 1 is current year, index 2 is the age threshold.

200.description: Development/test session and tokens when the dev bootstrap feature flag is enabled.

202.description: OAuth authorization started. No M8 session is created and tokens are issued only from the OAuth callback.

200.description: OAuth callback result with issued tokens.

post.summary: Enable the legacy anonymous profile for a session.
Disable the legacy anonymous profile for a session.

200.description: New access and rotated refresh token.

get.summary: List grants and proofs for the authenticated session.

post.summary: Publish a public post through the authenticated PDS session.

403.description: Session does not have write scope.

post.summary: Link an anonymous post to an identity.
Link a Germ contact URL after device trust.
Unlink Germ contact from an identity.

get.summary: Return public anonymous contact configuration for a post.
Check whether current sender can contact an anonymous post.

403.description: Sender does not meet contact requirement.

post.summary: Create a wallet presentation for an identity request.
Store opaque encrypted chat key backup.

get.summary: Return opaque encrypted chat key backup.

delete.summary: Delete opaque encrypted chat key backup.

post.summary: Verify INE face match and RENAPO checks.
Issue an INE-backed credential artifact from client-generated age proofs.

200.description: Issued credential. The response never includes birthYear, salt, or witness material.

409.description: The public commitment is already registered.

post.summary: Revoke or suspend an identity proof artifact.
Issue an m8 one-person-one-vote nullifier proof for a civic subject.

403.description: Alias is not active for this person.

post.summary: Link an authorized pseudoidentity DID to the current private person root.

get.summary: Download the age proof browser prover HTML.
Download the age proof WASM artifact.
Download the age proof zkey artifact.

post.summary: Verify and record a community nullifier proof.

400.description: Invalid proof, duplicate nullifier, or mismatch.

get.summary: Download the nullifier proof WASM artifact.
Download the nullifier proof zkey artifact.
Return public karma summary for a profile.
Return consent ledger, grants, and proof audit summary.

post.description: Available only before community activation. Once used, future admin changes must go through governance actions.

409.description: Bootstrap already used or community already active.

post.summary: Vote irreversibly on a governance action.
post.description: The signature is an Ed25519 signature over the canonical community vote payload. One admin DID can vote once per action.

signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 signature over the canonical vote payload.

keyId.description: Optional DID verification method id referenced by assertionMethod or authentication.

403.description: Not an admin, unknown voting key, or invalid vote signature.

409.description: Already voted or action not pending.

get.summary: Resolve a did:web DID document for a community.

x-m8-types.registryCheck: npm returned E404 for https://registry.npmjs.org/@para%2fm8-types in this environment, so this contract keeps local schemas until the private registry or package source is configured.
